name: cv-spider-v3
description: An ASP.NET Web Forms application that automatically discovers and collects email addresses from search engine results for CV/resume sourcing purposes. Features comprehensive email validation, cleaning, SQL Server storage, and Hebrew language support for Israeli job market targeting.
author: Or Assayag <orassayag@gmail.com>

scripts.build: echo 'This is a .NET project. Use Visual Studio or MSBuild to build.'
scripts.test: echo 'No tests configured for this .NET project.'
scripts.start: echo 'This is a .NET Web Forms project. Deploy to IIS or run from Visual Studio.'
